query: SELECT p.id, p.name, p.description, p.price, p.isActive, p.sortOrder, c.name as categoryName FROM products p LEFT JOIN categories c ON p.categoryId = c.id WHERE p.establishmentId = 150004 ORDER BY c.sortOrder ASC, p.sortOrder ASC;
